projectDescription: Corporate landing page for ALESPI Solutions, an HVAC engineering company offering installation, design, and maintenance of air conditioning, ventilation, and refrigeration systems for institutional, commercial, and industrial clients in Mexico.
keyFeatures: Modular HTML partial loading via fetch() for clean code separation
Tab-based navigation system for hero, services, expertise, credentials, and contact sections
Tailwind CSS v3 utility-first styling with custom brand tokens and animations
Client-side contact form with email validation and visual notifications
Intersection Observer-based scroll animations and animated statistics counters
Responsive design with hamburger menu for mobile devices
Sticky navbar with scroll shadow effect
Certifications from Daikin, Americ A.C., and CECATI displayed
Institutional client portfolio: SEDENA, Guardia Nacional, IMSS, ISSSTE, ANAM
Static site deployable on Netlify, Vercel, GitHub Pages, or any HTTP server
publicApiSurface: loadPartials() — fetches and injects HTML partials declared with data-include attributes
activateTab(tabName) — switches the visible tab section by name
initializeTabs() — binds click events to .tab-btn and [data-open-tab] elements
initializeHamburger() — toggles nav expanded class for mobile menu
mostrarNotificacion(mensaje, tipo) — displays a timed slide-in notification
initializeStatsObserver() — triggers animated number counters on scroll
initializeCardObserver() — fade-in animation for .service-card and .valor-card on scroll
initializeNavbarShadow() — adjusts navbar box-shadow on scroll
initializeAnchorScroll() — smooth scroll for anchor links
npm run build — compiles input.css to output.css via Tailwind
npm run dev — watches input.css for changes
npm start — serves the site on http://localhost:8080
